tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows a mildly elevated HbA1c, suggesting impaired glucose tolerance or prediabetes, while current glucose is within normal limits. Chloride is slightly elevated, which may be due to mild dehydration or metabolic compensation but is not alarming in isolation. Renal function, electrolytes, and calcium are within normal ranges. No acute laboratory abnormalities detected; recommend monitoring glycemic control.

text.div: Provider Organization: Cabinet de Médecine Générale
Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
